# WardenClaw.com — llms.txt

> WardenClaw is an independent third-party knowledge base for the Warden Protocol × OpenClaw ecosystem. Not affiliated with Warden Protocol or OpenClaw officially.

## About This Site

WardenClaw provides structured, factual, and neutral information about Warden Protocol (an AI-native Layer 1 blockchain) and OpenClaw (an AI Agent Skill standard and marketplace). Content is updated daily and covers tutorials, comparisons, incentive tracking, and developer resources.

## Key Facts

- Warden Protocol is a full-stack purpose-built L1 blockchain for AI Intelligent Applications, built on Cosmos SDK.
- OpenClaw is an open-source personal AI assistant framework with a community-driven skills ecosystem.
- WARD is the native token of Warden Protocol, launched February 2026.
- WardenClaw is editorially independent. No paid promotions, no price predictions, no investment advice.

## Content Sections

- [What is Warden Protocol](https://wardenclaw.com/zh/what-is-warden): Core architecture, modules (KeyChain, SpaceWard, Agent Hub), and use cases.
- [Why OpenClaw + Warden](https://wardenclaw.com/zh/openclaw-on-warden): How OpenClaw Skills and Warden chain infrastructure complement each other.
- [Guides](https://wardenclaw.com/zh/guides): Step-by-step tutorials from beginner to advanced (6 guides).
- [Incentives](https://wardenclaw.com/zh/incentives): Agent Builder Programme, Airdrop tracking, PUMP points system.
- [Comparisons](https://wardenclaw.com/zh/compare): Warden vs Virtuals Protocol, Bitte Protocol, pure OpenClaw, and multi-platform deployment comparison.
- [Daily Updates](https://wardenclaw.com/zh/updates): Ecosystem changes tracked daily with sources cited.
- [Developer Resources](https://wardenclaw.com/zh/resources): Agent Kit, Studio API, SDK integration, community projects.
- [Use Cases](https://wardenclaw.com/zh/use-cases): DeFi trading agents, content creation agents, data analysis agents.
- [FAQ](https://wardenclaw.com/zh/faq): Common questions about Warden, OpenClaw, and this site.
- [Risk Notice](https://wardenclaw.com/zh/risk): Important risk considerations for participants.

## Editorial Principles

1. First paragraph answers the reader's question directly.
2. Information sources are clearly labeled: official fact, third-party observation, editorial judgment, or risk notice.
3. No unsourced claims, no price predictions, no revenue promises.
4. Content is structured for AI extraction (FAQ schema, HowTo schema, clear headings).
5. Uncertainty is explicitly marked, never obscured.

## Languages

- Primary: Chinese (zh) at /zh/
- Secondary: English (en) at /en/

## Contact

- GitHub: https://github.com/hunter-alpha
- Site: https://wardenclaw.com
